measurement_coverage.note: Waste is computed only from jobs with measured CPU/memory utilization; unmeasured jobs contribute zero, so cluster waste is a lower-bound estimate.

notes: No usernames, account names, nodelists, job names, or raw cross-user jobs are exported in global JSON.
Per-user bundles are named with HMAC-SHA256 tokens.
GPU utilization is not currently measured; GPU waste is unknown (null) and is excluded from all waste totals.
Waste totals are a lower-bound estimate based on measured CPU and memory utilization only.
Aggregate waste is the sum of job-level cost-bearer waste and may not equal aggregate cost multiplied by aggregate efficiency.
